message:
test(mvcc): add verification gate stress test for safe-merge under 120 writers

Add verification_gate_safe_merge_correctness_under_high_contention test
exercising 5 phases: 40 AppendOnly writers to hot block, 40
IndependentKeys writers to shared block, 20 DisjointBlocks writers,
unmergeable conflict under Strict policy, and contention metrics +
expected-loss comparison. Validates zero corruption and SafeMerge
expected-loss <= Strict.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
